tools.name: projects.search
tools.description: Search for REDCap projects by name, description, or project ID using fuzzy matching. Returns matching project IDs and titles.

query.description: Search term — project name, description text, or numeric project ID

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: projects.getMetadata
tools.description: Get the data dictionary (field definitions) for a REDCap project. Returns field names, types, labels, validation, choices, and branching logic. Use this to understand a project's structure before reading or writing records.

fields.description: Optional list of specific field names to retrieve. Omit to get all fields.

tools.name: projects.getInstruments
tools.description: List all instruments (forms) in a REDCap project. Returns instrument machine names and human-readable labels.

tools.name: records.get
tools.description: Retrieve data for a specific record by its record ID. Optionally filter to specific fields or events (for longitudinal projects).

fields.description: Optional list of specific field names to retrieve

events.description: Optional list of event names (for longitudinal projects only)

tools.name: records.search
tools.description: Search records in a REDCap project with an optional REDCap logic filter expression. Returns matching records and their data. Use REDCap logic syntax for filters, e.g. '[age] > 18' or '[status] = "1"'.

filter.description: REDCap logic filter expression, e.g. '[field_name] > 18'. Omit to return all records.

fields.description: Optional list of specific field names to include in results

tools.name: records.evaluateLogic
tools.description: Evaluate a REDCap logic expression against a specific record. Returns true or false. Useful for checking eligibility criteria or branching conditions.

record_id.description: The record ID to evaluate against

logic.description: REDCap logic expression to evaluate, e.g. '[age] >= 18 and [consent] = "1"'

event.description: Event name (optional, for longitudinal projects only)

tools.name: survey.getLink
tools.description: Generate a survey link URL for a specific instrument and record. The instrument must be enabled as a survey in the project.

record_id.description: The record ID to generate the survey link for

instrument.description: The instrument machine name (must be survey-enabled)

event.description: Event name (optional, for longitudinal projects only)

tools.name: records.save
tools.description: Create a new record or update an existing record in a REDCap project. The data object must include the record ID field. Use projects.getMetadata first to learn the field names and types before saving.

data.description: Record data object with field_name: value pairs. Must include the record ID field (typically 'record_id').

overwrite.description: If true, overwrite existing values. If false (default), only save to empty fields.
